title: iseilema anthephoroides
intro: Iseilema anthephoroides, also known as 'Tall Windmill Grass', is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Iseilema anthephoroides typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form.
